script:
Around 1:50 AM, everything was normal.
Servers humming, lights steady, nothing unusual.
At 2:10 AM, I started getting nervous.
I kept checking the clock every few seconds.
2:13 AM came.
Nothing.
I actually felt relieved for a moment.
Then at exactly 2:14 AM, the lights flickered.
Not just once.
They flickered in a pattern.
Then everything went completely dark.
All the servers shut down at the same time.
And for a few seconds, there was total silence.
When the power came back, I rushed to the old server.
It was still running.
Like nothing had happened.
So I checked the backup folders again.
There was a new one.
Dated with the current day.
Inside it was another file.
Also called “incident_report.txt”.
I opened it.
It described exactly what had just happened.
Every detail.
Even mentioned that I had stayed late to witness it.
That’s when I noticed the last line.
